goal: Add a side-effect-free runtime execution decision layer that keeps contract-only mode closed, permits future dry-run execution only with explicit evidence, and blocks write execution until a separate permit authority contract exists.
scope_out: Do not mount or change runtime routes, call orchestrator, call providers, call DB, call GitHub, write files, deploy, change workflows, or change packages.
Do not allow write execution in this block.
claims: Runtime execution readiness can be decided without executing runtime work.
Dry-run execution requires operator approval, Maya gate evidence, provider isolation evidence, and bounded runtime.
Write execution remains blocked until a separate permit authority contract exists.
assumptions: BPK-020 remains contract-only until a later mount contract changes it.
This block decides readiness only and does not mutate routes.
dod: Contract-only mode keeps runtime execution closed.
Dry-run execution can become ready only with required evidence and bounds.
Focused tests, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: Runtime route changes, orchestrator calls, provider calls, DB calls, GitHub calls, writes, deployment, package, workflow, or write execution become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-020 mounted a contract-only runtime dry-run route. BPK-026 may decide whether runtime execution can be considered later, but must not execute or mount it.
